response.justification: Candidate is a strong full-stack/web engineer with broad language exposure and some C/C++ background at National Instruments, but the role requires native-level Japanese (not listed), deep embedded/LAN-switch firmware experience, and specialized security knowledge (MACsec, 802.1X, Captive Portal, Linux kernel modification, chip-vendor SDKs) that are absent from the resume. Recent work is predominantly TypeScript/Node.js web and platform engineering, not embedded networking security.
strengths: Some C/C++ experience at National Instruments on LabWindows/CVI
Strong Linux familiarity and long software-engineering tenure (15+ years)
Exposure to low-latency systems and infrastructure work
concerns: No native-level Japanese language proficiency indicated
No embedded firmware, LAN-switch, or chip-vendor SDK experience
No demonstrated experience with MACsec, 802.1X, NETCONF, SNMP, or Linux kernel source modification
